sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 5:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 5:1
items.html: The level is primarily phase one, which is the level of ZA. However, there is also the phase of male there, which has a level of phase two as clothing that remains from the last phase. (Inner Light, Item 14)
